description:
Returns a list of all Direct Cost Items for a Project.

See [Filtering on List Actions](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/filtering-on-list-actions) for information on using the filtering capabilities provided by this endpoint.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[origin_id]
parameters.description: Origin ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Origin ID.

parameters.name: filters[invoice_number]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) with the specified Invoice Number.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[payment_date]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) with a payment date within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: filters[received_date]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) with a received date within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

invoice_number.description: Unique identifier for a Direct Cost Item of type invoice

terms.description: The agreed upon Terms for the date of payment

employee.description: Employee tied to the Direct Cost Item
